//: Keelwright adapter hooks for Claude Code. Merge into <repo>/.claude/settings.json. See hooks/README.md.

PostToolUse.//: Ritual 10 — state-change currency. Fires after a Bash git push/merge; injects a reconcile reminder.

hooks.command: if printf '%s' "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | grep -Eq 'git[[:space:]]+(push|merge)|git[[:space:]]+.*--ff-only|gh[[:space:]]+pr[[:space:]]+merge'; then printf '%s\n' 'KEELWRIGHT ritual 10 (state-change currency): a push/merge just happened. Reconcile the front-door docs (NEXT-STEPS cursor, ROADMAP) and any affected auto-memory for now-stale claims. Use drift-proof phrasing. Leave history alone.'; fi

SessionEnd.//: Ritual 12 — lessons-learned + durable-notes snapshot. Reminds, snapshots the memory index to .harness/memory-snapshots, and prunes to the newest 20.

hooks.command: printf '%s\n' 'KEELWRIGHT ritual 12 (lessons-learned): before ending, append concise issues/mitigations/lessons to docs/lessons-learned/ and confirm the NEXT-STEPS cursor + auto-memory are current.'; SNAP_DIR="${CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR:-.}/.harness/memory-snapshots"; mkdir -p "$SNAP_DIR" 2>/dev/null && cp "${CLAUDE_MEMORY_DIR:-$HOME/.claude/memory}/MEMORY.md" "$SNAP_DIR/MEMORY.$(date +%Y%m%d-%H%M%S).md" 2>/dev/null; ls -1t "$SNAP_DIR"/MEMORY.*.md 2>/dev/null | tail -n +21 | xargs rm -f 2>/dev/null || true
